description: Calculate the confluence (percentage of area covered by cells) for the HeLa cell phase contrast image located at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/confluence/hela-cells.tif. Generate a binary mask where white pixels (255) represent cells and black pixels (0) represent background. Save the binary mask to ~/Fiji_Data/results/confluence/confluence_mask.png and record the measured confluence percentage as a single numeric value in ~/Fiji_Data/results/confluence/confluence_report.txt.
